Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a to-do list task created by the user, optionallly synced with Google Calendar.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this task

description.description: Optional detailed description of the task

completed.description: Whether the task has been marked completed

googleEventId.description: Optional Google Calendar Event ID linked to this task

meetLink.description: Optional Google Meet link created for this task

googleTaskId.description: Optional Google Task ID linked to this task

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated

/tasks/{taskId}.description: User-owned tasks synced with Google Calendar and local states.
